name: FocusForge
description: A productivity app that helps users stay focused, avoid distractions, and achieve their goals. It provides a Pomodoro timer, customizable workflows, and analytics.
features: Pomodoro timer with customizable work sessions and breaks
Task management with prioritization, deadlines, and reminders
Analytics and insights on productivity, time spent, and goal progress
target_audience: Students, professionals, and individuals looking to boost their productivity
